englishDefinitions: to end a romantic relationship with someone
to tell someone that you no longer want to be their partner
persianTranslation: رابطه‌اش را با تو تمام کردن
examples: He decided to break up with you because the relationship was unhealthy.
I didn't want to break up with you over the phone.
They plan to break up with you if they feel the relationship is not working.
